N

newRound() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.Controller
if this is the last round this method will smNotify all players and it will call gameResults.
nextPlayer() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.Game
this method is used to determine the next player

notifyAvailableCC() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.Controller
this method is used to smNotify all player of the available character cards for this game
notifyUsedCharacterCard(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.Controller
smNotify players except current of the character card used by the current players.
notIgnoreColor(StudentColor) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.client.CLI
 
notIgnoreColor(StudentColor) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.client.View
update the color not ignored during the influence calculation
notIgnoreTower(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.client.CLI
 
notIgnoreTower(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.client.View
consider the tower for the calculation of the influence
